name: Dagger
description:
Blessed with the powers of light while you were cursed with the powers of darkness, Tandy Bowen loves using her identity as "Dagger" to help heal the poorest of the poor. But now with the timestream entanglement, she's very glad to have you--the Cloak to her Dagger--by her side.

[Been a hot minute since I posted. Just a casual hiatus; mixture of life being life and me being a lazy little bastard, nothing new here.]
creator: Gargantuan_Lad
